title: ITC's Sidhant Malaiya joins Ashirvad by aliaxis as Head of Legal
description: Sidhant Malaiya has joined Ashirvad by Aliaxis as the Head of Legal.Malaiya is a 2011 graduate of Vivekananda Institute of Professional Studies.He has over 15 years of diverse legal experience across sectors including hospitality, manufacturing, real estate, litigation, and corporate advisory. His expertise includes corporate legal strategy, risk management, litigation oversight, and business advisory, and he is recognized for aligning legal frameworks with broader organizational objectives
